title: Texas: Texas Data Privacy and Security Act (TDPSA) deletion & opt-out
summary: Texas residents can request deletion of the personal data a business holds and opt out of its sale and targeted advertising, including through a recognized universal opt-out signal. The TDPSA took effect on July 1, 2024.
disclaimer: General information, not legal advice, and not yet independently reviewed — verify the current process and your eligibility before relying on it.
